calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Mar-22-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT TERRY MCGEE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is denied for failure to provide a proof of service. (301/AJR/) Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR #8620
